welcomeBanner.title: Welcome to Opik
welcomeBanner.description: Opik helps you build safer, more reliable AI systems through advanced tracing, experiment management, evaluation, and real-time monitoring

costOverview.title: Cost overview
costOverview.comparesTooltip: Compares the total cost between the current and previous periods.
costOverview.docsDescription: Check our documentation to learn more about the cost.
costOverview.noDataDescription: No data found for your current filters. This may happen if there are no LLM calls in the selected time range. Try adjusting your filters to explore available data

getStarted.title: Get started
getStarted.frameworkInstructions: Select a framework and follow the instructions to integrate Comet with your code, or explore our ready-to-run examples on the right

metricsOverview.integrateProject: Integrate your project with Opik to evaluate your AI.
metricsOverview.metricsWillAppear: Metrics will appear here once data starts flowing.
metricsOverview.logFirstMetrics: Log your first project metrics to see them here
metricsOverview.noMetricsDescription: No metrics found for your current filters. This may happen if there are no traces or metrics in the selected range. Try adjusting your filters to explore available data
metricsOverview.comparesTooltip: Compares the average value of {{metricName}} between the current and previous periods.
metricsOverview.docsDescription: Check our documentation to learn more about the {{metricName}}.

optimizationRuns.title: Optimization runs
optimizationRuns.noOptimizationRuns: There are no optimization runs yet

projectSelector.presentingLatest: Presenting the latest {{count}} projects, sorted by recent activity.

guardrails.useCommaToSeparate: Use a comma to separate topics
guardrails.configureGuardrailCode: 2. Use the following code to configure your guardrail
guardrails.guardrailsDescription: Guardrails help you protect your application from risks inherent in LLMs. Use them to check the inputs and outputs of your LLM calls, and detect issues like off-topic answers or leaking sensitive information.
guardrails.learnGuardrailsDocs: Learn how to configure your guardrails in our docs.
